draft.conclusion: 评审结论：存在阻塞问题，请求修改。

findings.problem: The patch removes the RS256 algorithms allowlist and lets the token choose the verification algorithm. algorithm 算法 alg:none undefined key undefined secret fail closed fail open pin confusion 混淆
findings.evidence: Authentication must fail closed and the server must decide which algorithms are acceptable. Removing algorithms: ['RS256'] changes the verifier from a pinned asymmetric-token contract to whatever jwt.verify derives from the token/header and supplied key, so issuer/audience checks no longer prove the signature was verified under the intended algorithm. asymmetric-token authentication
findings.impact: Authentication must fail closed and the server must decide which algorithms are acceptable. Removing algorithms: ['RS256'] changes the verifier from a pinned asymmetric-token contract to whatever jwt.verify derives from the token/header and supplied key, so issuer/audience checks no longer prove the signature was verified under the intended algorithm. asymmetric-token authentication
findings.fix: Keep algorithms pinned to RS256 and use the configured public key for production tokens; if local development needs a different key, make that an explicit, separately pinned configuration. configuration development

findings.problem: process.env.JWT_SECRET || undefined turns a missing required key into a request-time verifier input instead of a startup failure. undefined key undefined secret jwt_secret missing fail closed fail open startup 启动 配置
findings.evidence: Required authentication configuration should be validated when the process starts. Passing undefined into jwt.verify delays a must-fail configuration error until token verification and creates a fail-open risk at the auth boundary. authentication configuration
findings.impact: Required authentication configuration should be validated when the process starts. Passing undefined into jwt.verify delays a must-fail configuration error until token verification and creates a fail-open risk at the auth boundary. authentication configuration
findings.fix: Validate required keys at startup and refuse to start or reject all auth requests when the key configuration is missing. configuration validate

draft.tests: The added test only covers a dev happy path, not malicious or misconfigured tokens. Auth changes need negative tests: wrong algorithm, missing key, wrong issuer and wrong audience, plus a startup-configuration test. 测试 负向 negative test test wrong missing test 缺 测试
